svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="LQY6Xn5M_RSPXgFzgpUF" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-414" dy="-119" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="780" pageHeight="400" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：总损失 = value 的 MSE + policy 的交叉熵 + L2 正则" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="740" x="20" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hp" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#a6822a;fontSize=11;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="预测（网络输出）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="110" x="30" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ht" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#2a5d9c;fontSize=11;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="目标（训练样本）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="110" x="30" y="232" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="策略 p" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="90" x="40" y="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pi" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="MCTS 分布 π" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="90" x="40" y="116" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ce" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="交叉熵
− Σₐ πₐ log pₐ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="170" x="210" y="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="价值 v" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="90" x="40" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="z" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="对局结果 z" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="90" x="40" y="216" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mse" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="MSE
(z − v)²" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="52" width="170" x="210" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="th" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="参数 θ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="90" x="40" y="294" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="L2 正则
λ ‖θ‖²" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="170" x="210" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sum" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="总损失 L
= (z−v)² − Σₐ πₐ log pₐ + λ‖θ‖²" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="280" x="470" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ep" edge="1" parent="1" source="p" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="ce"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="epi" edge="1" parent="1" source="pi" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="ce"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ev" edge="1" parent="1" source="v" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="mse"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ez" edge="1" parent="1" source="z" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="mse"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eth" edge="1" parent="1" source="th" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="l2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ece" edge="1" parent="1" source="ce" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="sum"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="emse" edge="1" parent="1" source="mse" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="sum"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el2" edge="1" parent="1" source="l2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="sum"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="policy 用交叉熵：让网络预测分布 p 贴近 MCTS 搜索得到的 π（更可靠的「老师」）。value 用 MSE：让估值 v 贴近这盘棋的真实结果 z（+1 胜 / 0 和 / −1 负）。L2 正则：惩罚过大权重，抑制过拟合。三项相加为一个标量损失 L，用于反向传播。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="740" x="20" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: policy 用交叉熵：让网络预测分布 p 贴近 MCTS 搜索得到的 π（更可靠的「老师」）。value 用 MSE：让估值 v 贴近这盘棋的真实结果 z（+1 胜 / 0 和 / −1 负）。L2 正则：惩罚过大权重，抑制过拟合。三项相加为一个标量损失 L，用于反向传播。
